title: Bajaj Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!
